title: HoopieSMP
description: Required,QOL,Optimization and some graphic mods for the HoopieSMP.
body: This Modpack is made specifically for the Hoopie server, the server itself should be in the multiplayer tab by default, the required CLIENTID mod is present, and theres some QOL features like zoom, crawl, voice chat and JEI to let you browse any item recipes, included shaders, connected textures, and some animation packs to make the game feel more alive but you can disable them to your liking in the resource packs tab inside game options. You can also remove any mod you dont want but i recommend keeping stuff like Sodium and anything related to it since they're purely made to increase performance. This pack can also be used as your default vanilla instance since it will let you join any vanilla server (As long as game versions match ofc).
